verses.text: Jude, servant of Christ, to the called, 'sanctified by God the Father, and preserved in Jesus Christ'; mercy and peace be multiplied. Kept ones. Believers are sanctified and preserved in Christ.
Jude, servant of Christ, to the called, 'sanctified by God the Father, and preserved in Jesus Christ'; mercy and peace be multiplied. Kept ones. Believers are sanctified and preserved in Christ.
He exhorts to 'earnestly contend for the faith,' for ungodly men have crept in, turning grace into lasciviousness. Defend the faith. Creeping error calls for earnest contention.
He exhorts to 'earnestly contend for the faith,' for ungodly men have crept in, turning grace into lasciviousness. Defend the faith. Creeping error calls for earnest contention.
He recalls how God destroyed unbelieving Israel, the fallen angels, and Sodom, set forth 'for an example.' Warnings. Past judgments warn the ungodly today.
He recalls how God destroyed unbelieving Israel, the fallen angels, and Sodom, set forth 'for an example.' Warnings. Past judgments warn the ungodly today.
He recalls how God destroyed unbelieving Israel, the fallen angels, and Sodom, set forth 'for an example.' Warnings. Past judgments warn the ungodly today.
These filthy dreamers despise dominion and rail at dignities, where even Michael 'durst not bring... a railing accusation.' Reckless. They blaspheme what they do not know.
These filthy dreamers despise dominion and rail at dignities, where even Michael 'durst not bring... a railing accusation.' Reckless. They blaspheme what they do not know.
These filthy dreamers despise dominion and rail at dignities, where even Michael 'durst not bring... a railing accusation.' Reckless. They blaspheme what they do not know.
Woe to them! They went 'the way of Cain,' Balaam, and Korah; 'clouds... without water,' wandering stars for whom blackness is reserved. Empty and doomed. Their end is utter darkness.
Woe to them! They went 'the way of Cain,' Balaam, and Korah; 'clouds... without water,' wandering stars for whom blackness is reserved. Empty and doomed. Their end is utter darkness.
Woe to them! They went 'the way of Cain,' Balaam, and Korah; 'clouds... without water,' wandering stars for whom blackness is reserved. Empty and doomed. Their end is utter darkness.
Enoch prophesied the Lord comes 'with ten thousands of his saints' to judge the ungodly, who are murmurers and 'great swelling words.' Coming judgment. The Lord will judge all ungodly deeds.
Enoch prophesied the Lord comes 'with ten thousands of his saints' to judge the ungodly, who are murmurers and 'great swelling words.' Coming judgment. The Lord will judge all ungodly deeds.
Enoch prophesied the Lord comes 'with ten thousands of his saints' to judge the ungodly, who are murmurers and 'great swelling words.' Coming judgment. The Lord will judge all ungodly deeds.
Remember the apostles foretold 'mockers in the last time,' sensual, 'having not the Spirit.' Foretold scoffers. Their coming was no surprise.
Remember the apostles foretold 'mockers in the last time,' sensual, 'having not the Spirit.' Foretold scoffers. Their coming was no surprise.
Remember the apostles foretold 'mockers in the last time,' sensual, 'having not the Spirit.' Foretold scoffers. Their coming was no surprise.
But you, 'building up yourselves on your most holy faith, praying in the Holy Ghost, keep yourselves in the love of God.' Build and pray. Faith, prayer, and love guard the soul.
But you, 'building up yourselves on your most holy faith, praying in the Holy Ghost, keep yourselves in the love of God.' Build and pray. Faith, prayer, and love guard the soul.
On some have compassion; others 'save with fear, pulling them out of the fire,' hating the garment spotted by flesh. Rescue. Reach the wandering with mercy and urgency.
On some have compassion; others 'save with fear, pulling them out of the fire,' hating the garment spotted by flesh. Rescue. Reach the wandering with mercy and urgency.
'Now unto him that is able to keep you from falling,' and present you faultless, be glory and majesty for ever. Kept faultless. God alone keeps and presents us blameless.
